title_2: I-Screen Recorder Eku-inthanethi: Ngaphandle Kokubhalisa futhi Ngaphandle Kwamanzi Amaka
notAvailable_description: ScreenXRecorder ayisebenzi kuseli okwamanje. Vula kukhompyutha yakho ukuze uqale ukurekhoda.
title_3: ScreenXRecorder: I-screen recorder yamahhala eku-inthanethi, ngaphandle kokubhalisa noma amanzi amaka
description_3:
ScreenXRecorder iwuhlelo lwerekhodi lesikrini lamahhala elisebenza ngokuqondile kusiphequluli sakho — akukho okufanele ukufaka, akukho akhawunti edingekayo. Rekhoda isikrini sakho sonke, iwindi elithile, noma ithebhu lesiphequluli kuphela, futhi ungeze umsindo womakrofoni noma ividiyo yewebhu-khemera njengoba kudingeka.

Ngokungafani nezinye izinhlelo zokurekhoda, kiyisimple: urekhoda, ulande, uphela. Akukho iseti yokulungisa, akukho amanzi amaka, akukho izinyathelo ezengeziwe. Ifayela levidiyo elimhlophe elilondoliwe edivayisini yakho kuphela.

Ukurekhoda kwenzeka ngaphakathi kusiphequluli sakho. Akukho okupheshwa ku-seva, ngakho amarekhodi akho ahlala eyimfihlo ngokuphelele — kuhle ngemihlangano engaziwa, izethulo eziyimfihlo, noma okuqukethwe kobunikazi okungathandwa ukugcinwa efu.

Kuhambisana ne-Windows, macOS ne-Linux. Yakhelwe othisha abadala izifundo zevidiyografi, abahleli abarekhoda imibiko yamaphutha, abasunguli bokuqukethwe abaklama izixazululo, abasebenzi abakude ababhala izinqubo zomsebenzi, nabo bonke abadinga ukubanjwa kwesikrini okwethembekile ngaphandle kwamatata.
description_4:
Ngemuva kokuthi ukurekhoda kuqala, imakrofoni ihlala isebenza — kodwa ungayithulisa nge-clikha eyodwa futhi ulungise ukuzwelana kokukhipha nganoma iyiphi inhlokonhlobo ngesikhathi sochungechunge. Kusiza uma ufuna ukukhuluma ezingxenyeni ezithile kuphela, noma uma umsindo wangemuva uqala ukungena. Izilawuli zomsindo zihlala zibonakala.

Uslayidi wokuzwelana ukuvumela ukumisa izinga lomsindo elifanele ngaphambi noma ngesikhathi sokurekhoda. Ukwehlisa kunciphisa ukuhlolwa komsindo wendawo; ukwenyusa kusiza uma ukhuluma ngokuphezulu. Lungisa ngaphandle kokumisa noma ukuqala phansi ukurekhoda.
title_5: Rekhoda umsindo nevidiyo ngesikhathi esisodwa: beka iwebhu-khemera noma kuphi esikrini
description_5:
Ukuvula iwebhu-khemera kwengeza i-overlay ye-Picture-in-Picture kurekhodi lwakho. Uyidendeze nganoma iyiphi ingosi noma uhlangothi lwesikrini bese ulungisa indawo yayo noma nini ofuna — ngisho phakathi nokurekhoda. Lolu uhlelo olufanayo olubone ezifundisweni nasezindleleni zokudlulisa: ubuso bakho bubonakala ngenkathi okuqukethwe kudlala ngemuva.

Isebenza kahle kakhulu ngezinqubo zesofthiwe, izifundo eku-inthanethi, amavidiyo anezincazelo, noma ukurekhoda okufuna umethuli ukuhlala ebonakala. Beka ikhemera ukuze ingavimbi okuqukethwe okubalulekile.
title_6: Hlola, layisha, noma uphinde urekhode: wena unquma
description_6:
Ngemuva kokumisa, isikrini sokubuka sivela ngaphambi kokuthi noma yini ilondolozwe. Buka futhi, uma kuhle, layisha ngokuqondile edivayisini yakho. Uma into ingahambanga kahle, ukucofoza okukodwa kusetha kabusha uhlangothi bese uqala kabusha. Akukho ukuphathwa kwamafayela, akukho ukulayisha, akukho ukulinda.

Ifayela iyalayishwa ku-WebM, esebenza kubaladisi bevidiyo abaningi futhi imukelwa ngamaqonga amakhulu okuhlela nokwabelana ngaphandle kokuguqula. Ilungile ukusetshenziswa ngokuqondile kusiphequluli.
dialogReturn: Uqinisekile ufuna ukuphuma? Ukurekhoda kwamanje kulahlekelwa.
compatibility: Iziphequluli ezisekelwa: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, Opera ne-Safari.
dialogScreenCapture: Ukukhipha lokhu kwakungaba kuphathelene, akunjalo? I-screen recorder idinga isikrini.
dialogPictureInPicture: Donsa ikhemera endaweni enokufanela esikrini sakho. Ungayihambisa noma nini, ngisho ngesikhathi sokurekhoda.
dialogPictureInPictureAltImg: Isiqeshana sekhowudi esibonisa i-overlay yewebhu-khemera idendezwa ezindaweni ezahlukene ngesikhathi sokurekhoda
dialogInfoUseMicrophone: Ngeke ukwazi ukushintsha imakrofoni ngesikhathi sokurekhoda, kodwa ungayithulisa futhi ulungise ukuzwelana kokukhipha noma nini.
dialogInfoUseMicrophoneAltImg: Isiqeshana sekhowudi sokhiye wokuthulisa imakrofoni noslayidi wokuzwelana ngesikhathi sokurekhoda
step1Screen: Isinyathelo 1: Khetha isikrini, iwindi, noma ithebhu ongathanda ukubamba.
